name: Apryse
description: Apryse — Document SDK for PDF processing, annotation, digital signatures, and format conversion.

seo.title: Apryse — Object Storage / Media API
seo.meta_description: Apryse: Apryse — Document SDK for PDF processing, annotation, digital signatures, and format conversion.

when_to_use: PDF processing and annotation SDK for enterprise document apps
Adding digital signatures to contracts in web applications
Converting DOCX, XLSX to PDF with server-side rendering
Embedding document viewers in SaaS without iframe hacks
PDF accessibility remediation and ADA compliance automation

pros: Unified PDF, Office, and CAD document processing
Digital signatures with PKI and PAdES support
Consistent API across server, mobile, and web
Handles 30+ file formats without external tools
Strong support team for enterprise contracts
cons: Quote-based pricing, often six figures annually
Rebrand from PDFTron muddies documentation search
Large SDK footprint slows mobile app size
Open-source alternatives cover 80% of use cases
review.verdict: Premium all-in-one document SDK — pays off when you need breadth and fidelity, otherwise cheaper tools win.
review.best_for: Enterprises consolidating PDF, CAD, and Office processing under one vendor contract.
review.not_for: Teams with budget constraints or single-format needs.
